sidebar.name: Shlomi Nugarker
sidebar.description: I build websites and small-to-mid web applications end-to-end — from the database and API to the interface users actually touch.

about.heading: About me.
about.lead_1: I'm a full-stack developer based in Israel, working as a freelancer. I build websites and small-to-mid web applications
about.end_to_end_tip: Database, API and UI — the whole thing.
about.lead_2: — from the database and API to the interface users actually touch.
about.body: I try to keep the code simple enough that the next person to open it can pick it up quickly. Here are a few technologies I reach for, fueled by

services.heading: What i do.
services.description: I work as a freelancer with companies and individuals, building and shipping web products. Here is how I can help.

web_apps.title: Web Applications
web_apps.description: Small-to-mid web apps built end-to-end — from data model and API to the interface users actually touch.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Responsive, accessible interfaces with React, Next.js and TypeScript that stay fast and easy to maintain.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: REST APIs and server-side logic with Node.js and Express, wired to the right database for the job.

databases.title: Databases & Integration
databases.description: Data modeling and integrations across PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase and Firebase.

works.heading: Some of my works.
works.description: Check out some of the works I made at freelancing, company projects and even case studies.

makeble.title: Makeble
makeble.description: An AI-powered website builder — describe what you want in plain English or Hebrew and it generates, previews and deploys a Next.js app live. Built with a Monaco editor and one-click deploy. "Describe it. Ship it."

wanderly.title: Wanderly
wanderly.description: A social network for travelers — plan multi-stop trips, share them as posts, and layer community routes onto an interactive map. Integrates Claude AI for itinerary generation and real-time Socket.IO for a live feed.

roga.title: Roga Events
roga.description: A bilingual (Hebrew/French) marketing site for a corporate wellness company. A multi-page site with full RTL support, service pages statically generated from Markdown, image optimization, and thorough SEO (JSON-LD, Open Graph). Built with accessibility and performance in mind.

contact.heading: Say hi!
contact.body: Have a project in mind, or just want to talk shop? I'm always happy to hear about new ideas and collaborations. Feel free to reach out on
